rows.label: qev014403_MSG0001
rows.name:
Hey, please!
Somebody open this door![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014403_JNK0010
rows.name: Open

rows.label: qev014403_SEL0011
rows.name: Attempt to force the closed door open.

rows.label: qev014403_JNK0020
rows.name: Call out

rows.label: qev014403_SEL0021
rows.name: Call out to Ajoa inside.

rows.label: qev014403_MSG0002
rows.name:
A person...!?
You're trying to open the door for me, aren't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014403_MSG0003
rows.name:
Thank you... but this door
won't open without a keycard...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014403_MSG0004
rows.name:
A person...!? There's a person there!
I'm saved...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014403_MSG0005
rows.name:
Listen, the door to the purification plant stopped opening,
and I've been trapped in here this whole time...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014403_MSG0006
rows.name:
My comrades must definitely be
somewhere in this Biahno Water Purification Plant...
Please, get a keycard from them.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014403_MSG0007
rows.name:
Also... if there are any strange monsters around,
I want you to exterminate them... I heard
that thing's cry again just a moment ago...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014403_MSG0010
rows.name:
Oh, thank goodness! Now I can get out...
I also heard the monster's death cry...
You defeated that thing, didn't you?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014403_JNK0030
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev014403_SEL0031
rows.name:
Ask for details regarding the reason
she was trapped.

rows.label: qev014403_JNK0040
rows.name: Doubt

rows.label: qev014403_SEL0041
rows.name:
Ask about the cocoons enveloping
the purification plant.

rows.label: qev014403_MSG0011
rows.name:
The intrusion alarm went off... everyone went outside...
We heard screams...
Then Ian and I were attacked by something...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014403_MSG0012
rows.name:
Ian! Where is Ian?
What about the others...?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014403_JNK0050
rows.name: Respond

rows.label: qev014403_SEL0051
rows.name:
Tell her there was no one else
in the purification plant.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014403_JNK0060
rows.name: Question

rows.label: qev014403_SEL0061
rows.name:
Ask her what
attacked them.

rows.label: qev014403_MSG0013
rows.name:
Then... why do you have
the keycard to open the door?
That's something only the research lab staff should have.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014403_MSG0014
rows.name:
I see... To begin with,
why did you come here?
Unless you had business, there's no reason to come all the way...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014403_MSG0015
rows.name:
...Eh?
Rosie told you to come check on us?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014403_MSG0016
rows.name:
I see...
I ended up being saved by her...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014403_MSG0017
rows.name:
This sound... It's the alarm notifying us of an anomaly in the purification plant.
I wonder what is happening...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014403_MSG0018
rows.name:
Um... I'm sorry, but...
could you go take a look?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014403_MSG0019
rows.name:
I'll check the surveillance camera data.
First of all, I need to grasp the situation...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014403_MSG0020
rows.name:
It was a creepy native creature with four arms,
and it approached us while making a bizarre sound...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014403_MSG0021
rows.name:
We were attacked, I lost consciousness,
and when I woke up, I was in this room...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014403_MSG0022
rows.name: Why are you here?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014403_MSG0023
rows.name:
...Eh?
Rosie told you to come check on us?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014403_MSG0024
rows.name:
I see...
I ended up being saved by her...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014403_MSG0025
rows.name:
This sound... It's the alarm notifying us of an anomaly in the purification plant.
I wonder what is happening...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014403_MSG0026
rows.name:
Um... I'm sorry, but...
could you go take a look?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014403_MSG0027
rows.name:
I'll check the surveillance camera data.
First of all, I need to grasp the situation...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014403_MSG0028
rows.name: ...Hii![ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014403_MSG0029
rows.name:
Are you saying the outside has turned
into this state too...?
There was nothing like this before...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014403_MSG0030
rows.name: ...Hey, why are you here?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014403_MSG0031
rows.name:
...Eh?
Rosie told you to come check on us?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014403_MSG0032
rows.name:
I see...
I ended up being saved by her...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014403_MSG0033
rows.name:
This sound... It's the alarm notifying us of an anomaly in the purification plant.
I wonder what is happening...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014403_MSG0034
rows.name:
Um... I'm sorry, but...
could you go take a look?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: qev014403_MSG0035
rows.name:
I'll check the surveillance camera data.
First of all, I need to grasp the situation...[ST:wait ]
